div1.entryFree: Estimable, 1) valuable: Merch. I, 3, 167. 2) estimating, or attending the estimation of sth.: though I could not with such e. wonder overfar believe that, Tw. II, 1, 28, i. e. with such admiration caused by the estimation; with such admiring judgment; cf. Walkers' Crit. Exam. I, pag. Tw. II, 1, 28
